title: Iran Strikes Ship in Strait of Hormuz, Undermining Efforts to Restore Traffic
summary: The attack, confirmed by U.S. and Iranian officials, came after Tehran threatened to disrupt shipping in the waterway and as Washington sought regional support for its peace agreement.

title: U.S. Military’s Weapons Shortage Shows Few Signs of Easing Soon
summary: President Trump and Pentagon officials tried to reassure manufacturers as they sought additional funding from Congress.

title: Supreme Court Expands Trump’s Immigration Power
summary: Also, Iran strikes a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. Here’s the latest at the end of Thursday.

title: Hoping for Miracles as Venezuela Digs Out From Massive Quakes
summary: It is known as a “doublet,” two earthquakes in quick succession, and it has brought the Latin American country to its knees.

title: He Was Deported Back to Venezuela and Started Anew. Then the Quakes Hit.
summary: Venezuelans in South Florida were frantically trying to track down friends and relatives after two earthquakes in Venezuela. Jorge Erazo was among the missing.

title: Justices Clash on Whether Race Played a Role in Trump’s Bid to Deport Haitians
summary: The split mirrored one that has long divided Americans: how seriously to take the president’s loose, provocative and sometimes ugly remarks.

title: Supreme Court Expands Trump’s Power Over Immigration With TPS and Southern Border Decisions
summary: The court handed President Trump victories in his push to rescind deportation protections for hundreds of thousands of people and turn away migrants at the southern border.

title: ‘Nowhere to Go’: T.P.S. Ruling Plunges Many Migrants Into Limbo
summary: The decision renders 1.3 million people from more than a dozen countries, many who have lived in the United States for decades, vulnerable to deportation.

title: Mamdani’s Rent Freeze Is Approved by New York City Board
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s pledge to freeze rents for rent-stabilized apartments became a centerpiece of his campaign. Six months into his first year, a city panel delivered.

title: Deadly Heat Wave in Europe Continues to Smash Temperature Records
summary: The continent’s second heat wave since May continued to disrupt daily life for millions. Officials in Spain said it might have contributed to a spike in deaths.

title: Latest Victims of France’s Heat Wave: Children Locked in Family Cars
summary: As temperatures pass record levels in France, the heat wave-related death toll continues to rise.

title: Trump Keeps Undercutting Republicans’ Message, Squandering His Own Trifecta
summary: Divisions between the president and his party on Capitol Hill have muddled Republicans’ midterm pitch to voters, and have crippled the G.O.P. at what should be the peak of its power.

title: How Trump Wants to Upend Voting in America
summary: President Trump is demanding that Congress pass the SAVE America Act to change American elections. Our national politics reporter Nick Corasaniti looks at what’s in it.

title: Obama Says He Occupies a ‘Suite’ in Trump’s Head
summary: Former President Barack Obama says President Trump has an obsession with him and that Mr. Trump “knows better” than to say “crazy stuff” to his face.

title: This Doctor Can Change the Color of Your Eyes. Should He?
summary: Francis Ferrari, a French ophthalmologist, invented a controversial procedure that can change eye color. People from around the world are willing to take the risk.

title: With a Turkish ‘Abrazo,’ Istanbul Ascends as a Tango Capital
summary: Istanbul’s many tango schools, clubs and skilled dancers have won the city recognition, even among Argentine maestros, as a global tango destination.

title: Tickled Apes Reveal the Rhythmic Roots of Laughter
summary: A study of chimps, gorillas and other great apes, including human children, sheds light on how laughter has evolved.

title: The Supreme Court’s TPS Decision Is a Slap in the Face to Lawful Immigrants
summary: The Supreme Court just gave the Trump administration free rein to end Temporary Protected Status.

title: Is It Time for a New Sexual Revolution?
summary: One that actually brings men and women together.

title: Is Space Tourism Finally Ready for Takeoff?
summary: Delays and rising prices have made the promise of space travel for ordinary people more elusive than ever. Will that ever change?
